title: PandanChain DMS Landing Page
description: Designed and developed a marketing landing page for PandanChain, a Document Management System for Mapandan, Pangasinan. Iterated through major revisions to produce a polished final output.
highlight: First solo project — built a marketing landing page from scratch

title: Node.js Learning & Web Apps
description: Expanded backend knowledge through Node.js tutorials and hands-on development of small web applications. Studied architecture patterns and applied concepts through practice.

title: Sentiment Analysis Implementation Plan
description: Completed research and compiled an implementation plan for Sentiment Analysis covering methods, tools, and use cases applicable to local government data and community feedback.

title: Hack4Mapandan Presentation
description: Completed the PowerPoint presentation for the Hack4Mapandan hackathon project, showcasing the team's solution concept and technical approach.

title: MediTrack Web Frontend & Firebase
description: Revised and rebuilt the MediTrack frontend with Firebase database integration. Resolved critical issues causing data not to display correctly in the web system.
highlight: Resolved critical data-rendering bugs in production

title: MediTrack Mobile App (Flutter)
description: Developed the MediTrack mobile application using Flutter and integrated it with the existing web platform. Implemented Firebase backend connectivity for real-time data sync across platforms.
highlight: Built cross-platform mobile app integrated with web system

title: MediTrack Edit Profile & Avatar Upload
description: Implemented an Edit Profile feature allowing users to update personal information. Added avatar image upload capability for both mobile and web using Firebase Storage.

title: MediTrack Push Notification System
description: Integrated push notification alerts via Firebase Cloud Messaging to proactively remind users about medication schedules and important health activities.
highlight: Real-time push notifications for medication reminders

title: MediTrack Frontend Polish & Bugs
description: Resolved multiple bugs across both MediTrack mobile and web platforms. Polished and improved the front-end design across both systems for a consistent and professional look.

title: MediTrack H4M — Deployment
description: Finalized MediTrack for Hack4Mapandan by fixing frontend and backend bugs in the deployed Vercel app, resolving deployment issues, and improving overall UI/UX for the competition.
highlight: Deployed to Vercel and submitted for Hack4Mapandan

title: MediTrack Comprehensive Bug Hunt
description: Performed a full bug hunting session — testing core features, identifying UI and functional issues, debugging errors, and implementing initial fixes to improve overall app stability.
highlight: Full audit across UI, functional, and integration layers

title: MediTrack Auth UI Overhaul
description: Refined and fixed the mobile login page layout and usability. Enhanced the multi-step registration page UI for better user interaction and flow.

title: MediTrack Dashboard, Profile & Messages
description: Improved the mobile dashboard for smoother navigation and clearer data presentation. Refined the profile page UI and enhanced the Messages interface for layout consistency.

title: MediTrack Medication & History UI
description: Enhanced the Medication page UI for improved layout and readability. Improved the History page design for better organization and clarity of adherence records.

title: MediTrack Log Dose & Alerts UI
description: Refined the Log Dose dashboard page to optimize usability and streamline input flow. Upgraded the Alerts page UI to enhance visibility, responsiveness, and overall user experience.

title: Professional Portfolio & Activity Log
description: Developed this data-driven portfolio using Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Built a modular system that reads from local JSON and Markdown files for easy content updates without touching UI code.
highlight: The portfolio you're looking at right now!
